events.appearance_notes: Low activity; Two men were standing in the middle of the road. Suddenly, one man punched the other man in the face.
events.event_text: From 1.4s to 3.4s, two men were standing in the middle of the road. Suddenly, one man punched the other man in the face.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The beaten man tried to break free and escape, but was chased by another man and continued to be beaten.
events.event_text: From 4.8s to 29.1s, the beaten man tried to break free and escape, but was chased by another man and continued to be beaten.
